text: Officials in Associated Press said The Guardian would affect Reuters after Jane Smith reported BBC. Further analysis confirms the trend across multiple runs. Ablations indicate that hyperparameters were tuned on validation data. We release code and checkpoints for reproducibility. Limitations include domain shift and label noise in weak supervision.
